title: Sweet You
lyrics: Oh, oh, you know Oh, oh, oh, you know Just how to touch me the right way Just how to make my mind go crazy Baby, you touch me right in my sweet spot Now I don't know what to do with this I don't know how to do this memory Should I let it go Or remember the glimpse of beauty I got last night Baby, I know you don't wanna show me your sweet spot But I sorta like the way you came on to me Drunk a little bit, now you can't find the words to tell me That you're in love with me, baby But if you find, you might just Huh, let me get inside and touch the sweet Youth inside of all of you I can feel a little bit of that falling all over my fingers And we're flying away Beyond the hurl of your memory And my inability to take your face without your heel Baby, be with me more I just want you to know All I see and all I adore Is all in your sweetness, baby Come on, come on, give me some of that Sweet inside, soft side I don't care if you wanna run and hide I'll find the you that you want So that the world can see What you're really made of, baby Come and find that sweet with me And I'll see no you down in the village Wanna know if your name is really your name Or you pretend this is mad for real Or are you looking for real? Cause if you look down next to you You're gonna find me waiting on the things That you said you would be Waiting on the things that you swore were sweet Like the candy I know you are sweet Like the woman I know you came from, baby Can't you make her look that way when you look at me? Sweet Like a candy dot in the morning Do you have me in your love? Oh, then Tell Pummy how sweet frosting all over me, baby Treat you

lyricsSegments.text: Oh, oh, you know
Oh, oh, oh, you know
Just how to touch me the right way
Just how to make my mind go crazy
Baby, you touch me right in my sweet spot
Now I don't know what to do with this
I don't know how to do this memory
Should I let it go
Or remember the glimpse of beauty I got last night
Baby, I know you don't wanna show me your sweet spot
But I sorta like the way you came on to me
Drunk a little bit, now you can't find the words to tell me
That you're in love with me, baby
But if you find, you might just
Huh, let me get inside and touch the sweet
Youth inside of all of you
I can feel a little bit of that falling all over my fingers
And we're flying away
Beyond the hurl of your memory
And my inability to take your face without your heel
Baby, be with me more
I just want you to know
All I see and all I adore
Is all in your sweetness, baby
Come on, come on, give me some of that
Sweet inside, soft side
I don't care if you wanna run and hide
I'll find the you that you want
So that the world can see
What you're really made of, baby
Come and find that sweet with me
And I'll see no you down in the village
Wanna know if your name is really your name
Or you pretend this is mad for real
Or are you looking for real?
Cause if you look down next to you
You're gonna find me waiting on the things
That you said you would be
Waiting on the things that you swore were sweet
Like the candy I know you are sweet
Like the woman I know you came from, baby
Can't you make her look that way when you look at me?
Sweet
Like a candy dot in the morning
Do you have me in your love?
Oh, then
Tell Pummy how sweet frosting all over me, baby
Treat you
